mapper.sql: id, user_id, token, expires_at, created_at, revoked
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token (user_id, token, expires_at, created_at, revoked) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refresh_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0 AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM refresh_token WHERE expires_at < NOW() OR revoked = 1
